focus: Evaluate learning-to-rank before neural reranking, using cached field-sum pools and cached Ollama similarities as optional features.
reason_started: The operator asked whether LTR should be tried first for the ranking problem and whether local embeddings should be used as features.
reason_ended: LTR completed with cross-validated evidence; it improved field-sum but did not beat refined PRF, so it was not promoted.

validators_executed.name: node --test test/ltr.test.js
validators_executed.evidence: Validated LTR feature extraction, learned reranking behavior, query-fold cross-validation, and candidate-pool recall.

validators_executed.name: npm run eval:cranfield:ltr with Ollama features
validators_executed.evidence: Graded and binary LTR runs with cached Ollama similarities completed; both stayed below refined PRF under cross-validation.

validators_executed.name: npm run eval:cranfield:ltr lexical feature ablation
validators_executed.evidence: Lexical/PRF-only LTR ablation completed and beat the Ollama-feature variant under cross-validation.

validators_executed.name: npm run validate
validators_executed.evidence: 40 node tests passed; MDE parser, traceability validation through GEN-020, fixture index check, and fixture evaluation passed. Final run is recorded in VAL-030.

validators_skipped.name: remote OpenSearch LTR plugin validation
validators_skipped.reason: Deferred because offline cross-validated LTR did not beat refined PRF.

validators_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
validators_skipped.reason: No deployment was requested; GEN-020 leaves the public/default architecture unchanged.

evidence_quality_notes: Cross-validation is the promotion metric for LTR; in-sample gains are capacity evidence only.
Candidate-pool oracle evidence confirms large ranking headroom, but relevant-document pool recall is still incomplete.
Cached Ollama llama3.1:8b similarities did not help the LTR ablation.
